value.text: Our first anniversary, the July release and what's next?!?
Cassini, packed with new features, is here
Galileo Neo with Kernel 6.7.1, Plasma offline and Calamares fixes
Our refresh release, Endeavour Neo, is available
Our new ISO release is here, meet Mercury
Mercury Neo with Linux 6.13.7 and Arch mirror ranking bug fix
Ganymede Neo is out with core updates and upstream NVIDIA changes
The long wait is over, Ganymede has arrived
What’s New in EndeavourOS Titan Release?
